name: Poletowin Pitcrew Holdings, Inc.
summary: Poletowin Pitcrew Holdings, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the testing/verification and evaluation, and Internet supporting businesses in Japan and internationally. The company's Testing/Verification and Evaluation Business segment provides defect detection services in support of enhancement in product quality of software and hardware. This segment also offers testing services, such as detecting defects and adjusting the balance of difficulty level in consumer electronic games, social games, mobile phone content, smartphone and tablet PC content, and PC software, as well as in pachinko and arcade slot machines; verification and evaluation services; and translation services, including the translations of the in-game texts of game software designed for overseas markets, instruction manuals, Websites, game proposals, and specification documents. Its Internet Supporting Business segment monitors texts, images, and videos posted on Internet message boards, blogs, SNS, etc.; and provides Web investigation and server monitoring, and customer support services. The company also offers services to produce subtitles audio guides for television programs; develops and operates UDCast service; and provides support services, such as visa obtainment, school enrollment, and daily life procedures for foreign personnel working in medical institutes. Poletowin Pitcrew Holdings, Inc. was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
